# Typography guidelines using tailwindcss (2025-06-29 04:30Z)

_**User**_

Following the typography guideline below to create a great typography only use tailwindcss classes and minimal external css:
1. For Chinese: @https://w3c.github.io/clreq/ 
2. For English: @https://practicaltypography.com/typography-in-ten-minutes.html 
3. For Japanese: @https://www.w3.org/TR/jlreq/ 
4. For Korean: @https://www.w3.org/TR/klreq/ 
Use this cdn if you need extra great fonr: @https://chinese-font.netlify.app/zh-cn/cdn/

2. **Japanese Typography (W3C JLREQ)**:
   - Proper Japanese font stacks
   - Ruby text support (already partially implemented)
   - Line breaking rules
   - Mixed script handling (Hiragana, Katakana, Kanji, Latin)

3. **Korean Typography (W3C KLREQ)**:
   - Korean font stacks (Hangul)
   - Proper spacing for Korean text
   - Mixed script support

4. **English Typography**:
   - Good font selections
   - Proper line heights and spacing
   - Readability considerations
